caption: A video gameplay screen displays a reward titled "LOVELY PRESENT" featuring a digital football player card for "JASON PIERRE-PAUL," an "ROLB" with a rating of "90." The background is a vibrant purple gradient, and various game stats appear at the top, including "173,037," "14,600," "2,343,543," and "LV 19." At the bottom of the screen, menu options read "ARK/UNMARK," "DISMISS ALL," and "BACK." In the bottom-left corner, a small inset video window shows a young man with blonde hair wearing a dark navy blue t-shirt. He is positioned in a room with a decorated Christmas tree visible behind him. As the clip progresses, the man's expression shifts from an open-mouthed look of surprise to a wide-eyed, shocked expression, reacting to the digital card shown on the main screen.
